# Text media information atom ('text')

**Atom**

An atom that contains information about text media.

## Overview

The text media also requires a text media information atom. This media information atom is stored in a base media information atom (`'minf'`) in the base media information header atom (`'gmhd'`) (see [doc://com.apple.qtff/documentation/quicktime-file-format/Base_media_information_atom]). The type of the text media information atom is `'text'`.

## Data fields

- **Size**: A 32-bit integer that specifies the number of bytes in this text media information atom.
- **Type**: A 32-bit integer that identifies the atom type.
- **Matrix structure**: A matrix structure associated with this text media.

## Storing text data

- **Text sample description**: An atom that defines how to interpret text media data.
- **Text sample data**: An atom that contains text data.
- **Hypertext and wired text**: Store hypertext in a text track sample atom.
